author: DominicVainMod
content:
Incoming Town Hall - June 4

Grab your crew and get ready for a Town Hall coming on June 4! 

We'll be sharing juicy sneak peeks and getting into detail on upcoming transformational updates happening this year, like:
SAGE Labs C4 Update: A game-changing update to our browser-based experience featuring Combat, Claim Stakes, Crafting Habs, and Council Rank,Mid Year Star Atlas Update: A major milestone for our UE5 experience that introduces early progression systems for the first time,Holosim: Our free-to-play version of SAGE Labs,
 Where: ⁠🎤┃Atlas Amphitheater
  When:
